creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 161660
Patch

- Remove python_env python_bol replaces, they don't seem to be used, and also break on proposed shebangfix.mk changes
- Don't need to shebangfix pemu-start.sh, it's /bin/sh as it is
- Add NO_ARCH
- Merge USES lines
- No need for options.mk inclusion
